articles.title: Pretorius' maiden T20 century consolidates Unicorns' top spot
articles.description: Lhuan-dre Pretorius finished on 102* in the chase of 144 after Matthew Short had restricted MI New York with 3 for 24

articles.title: Shoriful returns as Bangladesh bowl against unchanged Zimbabwe
articles.description: Visitors need a victory to level the series while hosts eye a series win today

articles.title: Litton Das ruled out of ODI series against Zimbabwe with calf injury
articles.description: Parvez Hossain Emon has been named Litton's replacement for the second and third ODIs

articles.title: Bangladesh look to overturn batting woes as Zimbabwe eye series win
articles.description: Bangladesh's tour has been marred by collapses so far and they can't afford another one

articles.title: Muzumdar urges India to 'stay in the present' after T20 World Cup malfunction
articles.description: The India head coach wants the team to "leave aside the disappointment" of the T20 World Cup and look ahead to the Test against England

articles.title: Holden clings on to keep Middlesex hopes alive
articles.description: Hard-fought 62 on tough pitch make it back-to-back wins

articles.title: Smeed leads Somerset to emphatic victory over Derbyshire
articles.description: Opener's superb 89 included six sixes off 51 balls to take the holders to 214 for 6

articles.title: Roy shows his enduring class as Surrey surge past Sussex
articles.description: Unbeaten century shows that former England batter is still a dangerous prospect in shortest format

articles.title: Lynn secures Northants' knock-out berth as Glamorgan are made to wait
articles.description: Impressive century proves too much for hosts as Harrison cleans up with three wickets

articles.title: Lees leads the charge as Durham hunt down Foxes
articles.description: Target of 157 is no match for Durham captain, with superb 80 from 44 balls

articles.title: [Watch] 'I don't want to rest' - R Ashwin's hilarious mimicry of Sanju Samson leaves fans in stitches
articles.description: Sanju Samson has been left out of India's playing XI, but that hasn't augured well for the Men in Blue. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, who replaced him, has not been able to do justice to his talent so far.

articles.title: [WATCH] Rashid Khan, Rahmanullah Gurbaz, & Afghanistan stars break down while bidding final farewell to Shapoor Zadran
articles.description: Many of the players were visibly emotional as the coffin was brought out of the aircraft.

articles.title: 'Better understanding, bit more awareness' - Parthiv Patel suggests ideal template for Indian batters in 4th T20I vs England
articles.description: "It looked like there was only one team that turned up on the day, considering the way India played," Parthiv Patel said while dissecting India's 125-run defeat against England in the third T20I.

articles.title: ‘This wasn't a surprise’ - Sachin Tendulkar congratulates Sourav Ganguly after ICC Hall of Fame induction
articles.description: Tendulkar recalled their decades-long friendship and congratulated the former India captain on the prestigious recognition.

articles.title: ‘Somewhere, a future captain and icon will be born…’ - Virender Sehwag's quirky post on July-born Indian captains
articles.description: Sehwag pointed out that three iconic Indian skippers, MS Dhoni, Sourav Ganguly, and Sunil Gavaskar, celebrate their birthdays within a span of just four days in July.

articles.title: 'Surprised to see an Indian batter struggling so much against spin' - Mohammad Kaif slams Tilak Varma ahead of ENG vs IND 2026 4th T20I
articles.description: Mohammad Kaif urged Tilak Varma to improve his batting against spinners, saying that the southpaw struggles to rotate strike, let alone hit boundaries.

articles.title: ‘The bounce is definitely a little extra’ - Mohammad Ashraful on Bangladesh's batting woes in Zimbabwe
articles.description: "We couldn't make the adjustment in this place. The bounce is definitely a little extra. Although for the last seven months we have tried to play on good wickets," said Ashraful.

articles.title: 'Sometimes, you've got to fight harder’ - Phil Salt reflects on crucial innings after guiding England to dominant win over India in 3rd T20I
articles.description: The right-handed batter had an unusually quiet start to his innings, managing just 17 runs off his first 19 deliveries.

articles.title: 'He has not come through recommendation' - Aakash Chopra on Harshit Rana's spot in Team India's playing XI in 4th T20I vs England
articles.description: "His numbers are not that bad. He has done decently in whatever chances he has gotten," Aakash Chopra said about Harshit Rana.

articles.title: Shreyas Iyer vs Suryakumar Yadav: Comparison after first five matches as captain
articles.description: Shreyas Iyer is currently leading the Indian team in the five-match T20I series.
